comments: PlanningTel Accessibility Checker is a free online tool that checks websites against WCAG 2.1 guidelines. Users paste a URL and receive an instant score, grade, and list of specific accessibility issues found. A detailed PDF report with prioritised fix recommendations is available for download.
features: Free online WCAG 2.1 accessibility checker. Paste any URL for an instant accessibility score (0-100) with grade, issue count, and specific WCAG violations. Checks 17 criteria including colour contrast, alt text, ARIA, headings, forms, and more. Detailed PDF report with fix recommendations available.
title: PlanningTel Accessibility Checker
